jobs.title: Simple Website Development for Business Plan
jobs.description: I’d like to create a 3–4 page website for my padel consulting company, focused on the management, development, and business growth of padel projects in the U.S. and internationally. The goal is to build a clean, modern, and professional website that highlights my experience and the services I offer to clubs, investors, and brands looking to join or expand within the fast-growing padel industry. 🔹 Reference Website For structure and concept inspiration, please check: 👉 https://jf2academy.com/methodology https://offthewallconsulting.co/ This link is only a conceptual reference, not a design model. I’d like something more elegant, premium, and minimalist, with a light palette, strong visuals, and a consulting-style aesthetic. 🔹 Website Scope (3–4 Pages) The site will be bilingual (English and Spanish), and I’ll provide all final text and translations once the structure is approved. HOME / INICIO Hero banner with professional padel imagery and a short mission statement. Introduction to what the company does. Clear CTA (e.g., “Work with us” / “Join the padel movement”). SERVICES / SERVICIOS Detailed description of the four main service areas: Padel Club Management & Operations Corporate Events & PRO-AM Experiences Padel Academy & Player Development Investment & Consulting for New Padel Projects THE PADEL OPPORTUNITY / EL POTENCIAL DEL PÁDEL Section highlighting the growth of padel in the U.S. Key data and insights for investors. Market trends and opportunities. CONTACT / CONTACTO Simple contact form (Name, Email, Message). Direct email: Requirements I’d like you to handle the entire project — including design, structure, hosting setup, domain connection, and publication. The design should be modern, clean, responsive, and SEO-friendly. I’ll provide the text and images once the layout is ready. The goal is to have a professional digital presence ready to go live. Budget My total budget is $350 (all included) — covering design, development, hosting setup, and full delivery until the website is live. What you’ll need from me to begin.

jobs.title: Build “Freshness Speed Run” (Android + Windows), Ads + Leaderboard, iOS-ready, ASAP
jobs.description: We are seeking a skilled game developer to create a polished, lightweight endless runner game. The game features a hero who runs while shadow demons drain power, green lightning bolts restore power, and an in-game shop for extra lives and speed boosts. The game will be ad-supported with an ad-free option and include leaderboards. The initial release will be for Android and Windows PC, with potential for iOS later.

jobs.title: Menu responsive
jobs.description: I developed a web-based game. It’s very simple and only has a menu interface, but it’s not responsive. I want the game’s menu to be fully responsive, so it looks properly scaled and proportional on phones, tablets, and different computer monitors. I also want to completely remove scrolling from the menu and ensure it works correctly for everyone.

jobs.title: Script to process Rocket Solver .rsl file into parsable (.csv or .txt) format
jobs.description: Rocket Solver is a public Poker solver for a No Limit Holdem, that can be used to compute Game Theory Optimal strategies. These strategic game trees are saved into their inhouse .rsl files. This file amongst other things, tells the user what an optimal strategy looks like at each node of the defined game tree. I am a Professional Poker player (and former software engineer), who would like to export the strategies inside this file, and plug them into other more streamline tools I have built for studying Poker. Unfortunately Rocket Solver does not have a built in functionality to export the complete strategies into parsable formats. I have tried using AI to guide me on how to reverse engineer these files but have not had any success. I would like to hire someone experienced at reverse engineering, to provide me a solution that reads these .rsl files and saves the strategies into a parsable format (.txt / .csv etc). My guess is it isn't much work, but I have no experience doing any reverse engineering at all. Happy to discuss. I have provided a very simple example .rsl files.

jobs.title: Technical Co-Founder / Automation Engineering Partner Needed for AI-Powered Business Solutions
jobs.description:
I'm the founder of yourAIarch, an AI-powered architecture and automation consulting firm. I'm seeking a long-term technical partner to build and maintain sophisticated automation systems that will transform how businesses operate. I am based in NYC and have made connections in this space. I am new to the market but have a lot of experience in marketing and ongoing support from mentors. Please read the description below and feel free to reach out to me if you have questions.

youraiarch.com

About the Role

This is NOT a one-off project—I'm looking for an ongoing partnership with someone who can serve as the technical backbone of our automation practice. You'll be responsible for building, and maintaining automation solutions while I focus on client relationships and business development.

What We're Building

Automation services include:

1. Email Automation & Campaigns - Multi-channel nurture sequences with dynamic content personalization, behavioral triggers, A/B testing, and advanced segmentation

2. AI Call Agents - Conversational AI voice systems for customer support, lead qualification, appointment scheduling, and follow-ups with natural language processing

3. Lead Qualification & Routing - Intelligent lead scoring systems that automatically route prospects to appropriate sales teams based on behavior, demographics, and engagement

4. Custom Workflow Automation - End-to-end process automation connecting disparate systems, eliminating manual tasks, and streamlining operations across departments

5. CRM & System Integration - Seamless data synchronization between CRMs, marketing platforms, project management tools, and custom databases

6. AI-Powered Analytics & Insights - Real-time dashboards, predictive analytics, automated reporting, and actionable intelligence from business data

Technical Requirements

Have expertise in:

- AI/ML Integration: OpenAI API, Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini, or similar LLM platforms; prompt engineering and RAG systems
- Automation Platforms: Make.com, Zapier, n8n, or custom-built solutions
- Backend Development: Node.js, Python, or similar; API design and microservices architecture
- CRM APIs: Salesforce, HubSpot, Pipedrive, Monday.com
- Voice AI: Twilio, Bland.ai, Vapi, or similar telephony platforms
- Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, or similar; complex query optimization
- Cloud Infrastructure: AWS, Google Cloud, or Azure; serverless architectures
- Email Platforms: SendGrid, Mailgun, Customer.io integration

What Makes You Ideal

- You've built production-grade automation systems that handle real business operations
- You can architect scalable solutions that grow with client needs
- You're comfortable working independently and taking ownership
- You can translate business requirements into technical solutions
- You have experience with white-label solutions or agency work
- You're entrepreneurial and excited about building something meaningful

Partnership Structure

This is an ongoing relationship, not a fixed-term contract. I'm offering a financial share of each completed deal delivered to clients. As we build our automation portfolio and scale our practice, there's significant opportunity for this to evolve into equity partnership.

Initial Scope

- Build 2-3 proof-of-concept automations showcasing our capabilities
- Establish our technical stack and development workflows
- Create reusable templates and frameworks for common automation patterns
- Document processes for scaling and client onboarding

*To Apply

Please share:
1. Examples of automation systems you've built (especially AI-powered)
2. Your approach to architecting scalable automation solutions
3. Your availability and preferred working arrangement
4. What excites you about this partnership opportunity

This is a chance to be a founding technical partner in a growing automation practice with revenue sharing on every client project. If you're ready to build something impactful, let's talk.

jobs.title: SAP HCM / ABAP / Cloud Integration Experts for German Enterprise Projects in Bangalore
jobs.description:
JoinNOW is a company that connects German businesses with AI-vetted tech professionals and manages hiring, compliance, and onboarding for enterprise clients in the DACH region. They are expanding their India-based SAP delivery capability for ongoing German enterprise-grade SAP projects, with operations centered in Bangalore.

We are assisting JoinNOW in identifying senior SAP experts based in India for full-time collaboration, working from Bangalore (on-site or hybrid).

We're Looking For:
- SAP HCM Expert (German HR/payroll compliance exposure is a plus)
- SAP Cloud Integration Specialist (CPI / PI / PO)
- SAP ABAP Developer
- Any SAP consultant with deep enterprise-level implementation experience

Ideal Candidate Profile:
1. Based in India, open to working from Bangalore
2. Experience working with German or DACH-region enterprise clients
3. Familiar with German delivery standards — structured documentation, precision, and timeline reliability
4. Strong communication in English (German language skills are welcome but optional)
5. Looking for long-term enterprise engagement

When Applying, Please Include
- Your SAP specialization(s)
- Example of German/DACH client work you've done
- Confirmation that you are open to Bangalore-based full-time engagement
- Your expected monthly rate range for enterprise collaboration

This initiative aims to form long-term SAP delivery teams supporting German enterprise accounts through JoinNOW.

jobs.title: Framer Website Designer Needed
jobs.description:
Hi,

I’m looking for an experienced Framer website designer to build a high-end, modern one-page website for my company FlyVision.

FlyVision creates premium real estate media for high-end real estate agents, such as photography, videography, drone and FPV videos, social media content, and branding content for real estate offices.

The goal of this project is to replace my current website, which feels too cheap, static and basic. I want a website that feels professional, clean, modern and high-end, with smooth animations and strong visual presentation.

The website must be built entirely in Framer, because I want to be able to:

Change text myself

Replace images and videos myself

Make small adjustments without needing a developer

I have recorded a detailed explanation video where I explain exactly how I want the website to look and function. This video, together with my current website and a competitor website, should be used as the main reference.

What you must include in your proposal

Please include the following clearly and at the beginning of your proposal:

Examples of Framer websites you have built before (links required)

Your price (fixed price or clear price range) for this project

Your estimated delivery time (how long it will take to finish the website)

Applications without these three points will not be considered.

Important notes before you apply

The website must be built in Framer

I will add all text, images and videos myself

You do not need to create or place content

Your focus is on:

Design

Layout

Animations

Structure

Framer setup

References

Current website: https://flyvision.nl/

Competitor website (style & animation reference):
https://houseofpouw.com/#home

Explanation video: https://www.icloud.com/photos/#/icloudlinks/00eMsqnTIcr0DtUFcz76_paQQ/ 

Use the color profiles in the attchement.


Website structure & requirements (one-page)
1. Hero section

Text and buttons positioned similar to the competitor example

Fullscreen hero video

Video requirements:

No autoplay

Plays on click

Audio enabled

Smooth, high-end animations

2. Services section

Three services displayed next to each other

Horizontal scroll or slider interaction

Clean and modern layout

3. Video showcase section

Slider with multiple videos

Combination of:

Horizontal videos

Vertical (social media-style) videos

Smooth transitions and animations

4. About / Mission sections

Two simple sections

Each section:

Image on one side

Text on the other

Flexible layout (text length can grow)

5. Portfolio section

Photo grid

Before / after image sliders (3 examples)

Video slider:

5 videos

Autoplay enabled

Mute / unmute button

Smooth slide-in / slide-out animations

Compact spacing

Title and text under each block

6. Social media section

Three vertical social media videos next to each other

Title above the section

7. Contact section

Clean and professional layout

Contact form with:

Name

Email

Phone number

Message

Visible company contact details

Space for a short text

Design & technical requirements

Built fully in Framer

Smooth animations and transitions

Color palette similar to the competitor website

Font: Inter (bold where appropriate)

High-end, professional and modern look

Fully responsive (desktop & mobile)

Future work

If the collaboration goes well, there may be future work for updates or additional pages.

Thank you for your time.
I’m mainly interested in your previous Framer work, your price, and your timeline.

Best regards,
FlyVision

I also need two new industry-specific pages created within the site. These will function like landing pages targeted to specific audiences. I will provide the content — you would handle layout, structure, and design inside Webflow.

Ideal Candidate:

• Strong experience working in Webflow (required)

• Detail-oriented and able to follow direction

I’m ideally looking for someone who can start quickly and provide a fast turnaround. It would be great if initial updates could be ready by early next week.

⸻

Project Scope

• Handle two-way SMS logic (YES, DONE, ISSUE, etc.)

• Prevent duplicate or conflicting responses
• Log all SMS activity and status changes inside Google Sheets
• Ensure the system reverts back after staff substitute/coverage date

Full end-to-end , live demonstration required.

⸻

Required Skills

• Advanced Google Apps Script
• Strong understanding of triggers and time-based automations

Must be able to:

• Debug existing logic

jobs.title: Flutterflow Venue Hire Platform
jobs.description:
I am looking for a developer to build a very simple venue directory app using FlutterFlow and Supabase.

The app will help users find local venues for events such as meetings, parties, graduations, concerts, and community events.

This is an MVP project focused on speed, simplicity, and low cost.

No booking system and no payment system are required. The app is only for listing venues and connecting users with venue owners.

Project Scope
	1.	User Accounts
	•	Basic sign up and login using Supabase
	•	Two roles: Users and Venue Owners

	2.	Venue Listings
	•	Venue owners can:
	•	Create, edit, and delete listings
	•	Upload photos
	•	Add location, capacity, description, and contact details

	3.	Browse Venues
	•	Users can:
	•	View all venues
	•	Search by location or name
	•	Open venue detail pages

	4.	Contact
	•	Simple enquiry modal window (basic form)
	•	Simple in-app chat

	5.	Admin Access
	•	Simple admin page to remove users or listings if needed

Technology
	•	FlutterFlow
	•	Supabase (auth + database)

Deliverables
	•	Working FlutterFlow project (shared with me)
	•	Connected Supabase backend (I will create and share database access)
	•	Modern responsive layout
	•	FlutterFlow project ownership transferred to me

All work and intellectual property will belong to me.

This is a small MVP project.

Requirements
	•	Experience with FlutterFlow and Supabase
	•	Ability to deliver quickly
	•	Good communication

jobs.title: Senior Webflow or Framer Developer for Creative Production Studio
jobs.description:
We are Pilothouse Media, a creative production studio based in Ontario, Canada. We are undergoing a major rebrand and looking for an expert Webflow or Framer Developer to build our new, high-end website and launch it by May 13, 2026.

You will be handed high-fidelity Figma files and will work directly with our Digital Project Manager, who will manage all sprint tickets and QA. We do not micro-manage code, but we demand pixel-perfect execution, smooth performance, and a perfectly structured CMS.

The Technical Challenge (The "Behavioral Split"):
We are running a single domain that caters to two different audiences. We are using a flat URL structure with a dynamic navigation menu.

When a user is on the default pages (e.g., /work, /roster), the global navigation shows Menu A.

When a user clicks into the corporate hub (/brands), the global navigation must instantly swap to Menu B (e.g., /portfolio, /services), locking them into that user journey.

You will also need to build two separate CMS collections for our portfolio (one filtering high-end commercials, one filtering corporate case studies).

Deliverables:

- Pixel-perfect development from Figma to Webflow/Framer.
- Complex CMS setup for Portfolios, Directors Roster, and SEO Blog.
- Premium, buttery-smooth animations (page transitions, hover states, scroll triggers) that do not impact load speed.
- Technical SEO foundations (proper H1/H2 tags, fast load times, alt text).

jobs.description:
Kashfia is seeking a detail-oriented and tech-savvy individual to join our team as a QA & User Experience Coordinator. You will be responsible for thoroughly testing our mobile and web application, identifying usability issues, reporting bugs, and suggesting improvements. Your insights will help improve the performance, reliability, and user satisfaction of the Kashfia platform.

Key Responsibilities:

Test and evaluate mobile app and portal functionality across different devices.
Identify bugs, usability problems, and UX issues; document them clearly.
Communicate findings with the development team using tools such as Trello, Jira, or Google Sheets.
Follow up on fixes and ensure proper implementation.
Simulate user journeys and provide feedback from a patient’s perspective.
Propose enhancements to improve user experience and overall product quality.
Assist in writing and maintaining test cases and checklists for releases.

Requirements:

Basic understanding of software or mobile application usage and structure.
Strong attention to detail and ability to reproduce bugs and usability issues.
Ability to communicate clearly with both technical and non-technical teams.
Experience with QA processes, documentation, or bug tracking tools (preferred).
Comfortable using mobile apps, web dashboards, and reporting tools.
English and Arabic fluency (written and spoken).
Residency in Baghdad is required.

Preferred Qualifications:

Previous experience in a QA, product testing, or support role.
Knowledge of tools like Trello, Notion, Postman, or browser developer tools.

What We Offer:

Flexible working hours
Opportunity to grow with an innovative health-tech startup
Competitive compensation based on skills and performance

jobs.title: Elementor Pro Header Redesign (Mobile + Desktop)
jobs.description:
Elementor Pro Header Redesign (Mobile + Desktop)

Platform: WordPress + Elementor Pro

Task Overview

I need an experienced Elementor Pro developer to redesign and clean up my site header using Elementor Theme Builder, with a strong focus on mobile UX, logo sizing, and padding. Check out attached screenshot of the header and let me know which color you suggest for slim top bar.

This is not a full redesign.
All work must be done inside Elementor (no CSS hacks unless approved).

Required Header Design (Must Match Exactly)
🔹 Mobile Header Design (Critical)

The mobile header must have TWO rows ONLY:

Row 1 – Slim Contact Bar (Top)

A very thin bar showing contact information immediately:

📞 Phone number (tap-to-call)

✉️ Email address (tap-to-email)

📍 Office address (short format)

Requirements:

Height approx. 28–34px

Small, clean font

Icons recommended

Single-line layout (no wrapping)

Must feel light, not bulky

⚠️ Contact info must appear ONLY here
❌ Do NOT duplicate contact info inside the menu

Row 2 – Main Header
[ LOGO ]                           [ ☰ ]

Requirements:

Logo on the left

Hamburger menu on the right

Vertically centered

Compact spacing (no excess padding)

🔹 Mobile Menu (When ☰ is opened)

The mobile menu must show PAGES ONLY-Navigation only

Logo Size Requirements (Very Important)

Use Elementor responsive controls. Desktop, Tablet, and Mobile must be independent (no inheritance).

Target widths:

Desktop: 145px

Tablet: 120px

Mobile: 105px

Hard constraints:

Logo height must remain UNDER 48px on desktop

Logo height must remain UNDER 40px on mobile

Desktop Header

Logo, address, phone, and email may remain visible

Reduce padding / min-height so the header does not look tall or bulky

Clean, professional spacing

Padding & Bulkiness Fix

Remove unnecessary top/bottom padding

Remove excessive min-height

Header height should be driven by logo size, not padding

Rules

Use Elementor Pro → Theme Builder → Header

Do NOT change colors, fonts, or content outside the header

Do NOT redesign pages

Do NOT use global CSS unless approved

This task should be completed in one pass

Acceptance Criteria

I will approve the task only if:

Mobile header shows phone, email, and address immediately

Top contact bar remains thin and single-line

Contact info does NOT appear inside the mobile menu

Header is compact and not bulky

Logo height ≤ 48px desktop / ≤ 40px mobile

Mobile menu contains pages only

Desktop and mobile styles do not overwrite each other

To Apply

Please confirm:

You have experience with Elementor Pro Theme Builder

You understand responsive breakpoint overrides

You can complete this today

jobs.title: 🎮 Hiring Unity Developer – Online Multiplayer Fish Shooting Game (Realtime + Backend)
jobs.description:
============================================================ 
PROJECT OVERVIEW

We are developing an online multiplayer fish shooting game with 4 players per room, realtime gameplay, server-authoritative architecture, backend-controlled economy (coin, bullet, jackpot), server-controlled bots, and config-driven design (no hardcoded gameplay values). We are looking for an experienced Unity Developer to build the client side of the game. Backend will handle all authoritative logic.

============================================================ 
CORE ARCHITECTURE REQUIREMENTS

SERVER-AUTHORITATIVE MODEL

Server handles fish spawning, fish HP, damage calculation, fish death, reward calculation, jackpot logic, and room state.

Unity client sends shooting events and renders visuals strictly based on server responses.

Client must NOT calculate damage, fish death, or rewards.

============================================================ 
GAMEPLAY SCOPE

ROOM SYSTEM

Maximum 4 players per room.

Rooms may contain real users and bots.

Server decides whether a player is a bot or real user.

Room states: WAITING, PLAYING, FINISHED.

If server marks a player as bot, Unity simulates shooting behavior.

FISH SYSTEM

Each fish has HP, speed, movement path ID, reward multiplier.

All fish configuration must be loaded from backend API (e.g. /game-config).

No hardcoded fish data inside Unity.

SHOOTING SYSTEM

Unity sends shoot event to server.

Server calculates damage.

Server responds with result.

Unity renders hit/death animation.

ECONOMY SYSTEM

Coin balance handled by backend.

Bullet cost validated by backend.

Jackpot pool calculated by backend.

Unity only displays animation when jackpot triggers.

All calculations must be server-side.

============================================================ 
REALTIME REQUIREMENTS

Use WebSocket or propose suitable realtime solution.

Must synchronize fish spawn, damage events, coin updates, jackpot events, player join/leave.

============================================================ 
PERFORMANCE & OPTIMIZATION

Server does NOT continuously send fish positions.

Server sends spawn event with path ID, speed, and random seed.

Unity calculates and renders movement locally.

Goal: reduce bandwidth and support scalability.

============================================================ 
TECHNICAL EXPECTATIONS

Clean and maintainable architecture.

Clear separation of network layer, game state management, and UI.

Easily extendable structure.

No gameplay hardcoding.

============================================================ 
DELIVERABLES

Fully working Unity project.

Realtime 4-player room support.

Bot simulation based on server response.

Fish spawning and damage system.

Jackpot animation system.

Clean source code.

============================================================ 
IDEAL CANDIDATE

Experience building multiplayer games.

Strong understanding of WebSocket or realtime systems.

Familiar with server-authoritative architecture.

Experience with scalable game systems.

Bonus: experience in fish shooting or casino-style games.

============================================================ 
WHEN APPLYING, PLEASE INCLUDE

Portfolio of multiplayer games.

Proposed realtime solution (WebSocket, Photon, Colyseus, etc.).

Estimated timeline.

Suggested Unity project architecture.

============================================================ 
LONG-TERM GOAL

Build a strong technical foundation that can scale to hundreds of rooms, allows backend-controlled gameplay adjustments, and avoids rebuilding architecture in the future.

jobs.title: PHP Developer
jobs.description:
We are seeking a highly experienced Senior PHP / Laravel Developer to lay the architectural foundation for this initiative. 
This is a hands-on contract role focused on backend architecture, API design, and integration of PHP/Laravel framework. 

What You’ll Be Doing 
•	Designing and implementing scalable Laravel API architecture 
•	Establishing versioned API standards (v1/v2 governance) 
•	Building multi-tenant, secure backend services 
•	Implementing integration layers for: 
•	External vendor systems (OE / IBSA) 
•	HubSpot integration
•	Credit bureau integrations 
•	Other third party integrations
•	Designing event-driven syncing 
•	Implementing database schema enhancements (MySQL / RDS) 
•	Defining clean DTO, validation, and domain layers 
•	Creating technical documentation and handover framework 
What We’re Looking For 
Must Have: 
•	5+ years PHP experience 
•	3+ years Laravel (advanced level) 
•	Strong RESTful API design experience 
•	Experience building scalable backend systems 
•	Strong secure coding practices
•	Experience with MySQL / AWS RDS 
•	Multi-tenant data modelling experience 
•	Strong understanding of SOLID principles & clean architecture 
•	Experience integrating third-party APIs 
 
Highly Desirable: 
•	Fintech or lending platform experience 
•	Experience with API versioning strategies 
•	Experience working with brokers or aggregators 
•	Familiarity with event-driven architecture 
Budget: 1.6 Lakhs INR
Role: Contract Offhsore
Client: Australian1
Timing 5.30AM-6.00Am IST- 2.30PM-3.00Pm IST

jobs.title: Squarespace Developer Needed for Talent Network Directory
jobs.description:
**Job Description: Squarespace Developer for Talent Network Directory**

We are currently on the lookout for an experienced and highly skilled Squarespace developer to join our dynamic team and take on the exciting challenge of creating a scalable and filterable Talent Network directory. This project is a key component of our organization’s strategy to enhance connectivity and engagement within our community, and we are eager to find someone who can bring this vision to life.

Key responsibilities include:

- Designing and developing a scalable Talent Network directory using Squarespace, ensuring it can accommodate future growth and additional features.
- Implementing filtering capabilities that allow users to easily navigate and find relevant connections within the directory.
- Collaborating with our team to gather requirements and feedback, ensuring the final product aligns with our vision and user needs.
- Creating a visually appealing design that adheres to our brand guidelines while enhancing user experience.
- Conducting thorough testing to ensure functionality, usability, and accessibility across various devices and browsers.
- Providing ongoing support and maintenance for the directory post-launch, including troubleshooting any issues that may arise and implementing updates as needed.

jobs.title: Looking for an Advanced JavaScript Tutor
jobs.description:
I’m looking for an experienced Advanced JavaScript professional who can mentor me and help deepen my knowledge beyond the basics.

I already have a solid foundation in JavaScript, including:

-Variable declarations (var, let, const)
-Functions (declarations, expressions, arrow -functions, advanced function creation)
-Control structures (if/else, loops, switch)
-Collections (Arrays, Objects, Maps, Sets)
-Scope, closures, and basic asynchronous concepts

Now I want to move to advanced, real-world, professional-level JavaScript, like real advance :-)

If you know basics Javascript only please donot apply for this job.

e.g.
- Modren JAvascript for Backend
- Modular CLI Service creation
- Asynic and Service-side Javascript
- Async HTTP Service
- Clean JavaScript Architecture
- Structures sevice
- Bun
- HTTP and Websockets

and you can suggest more topics
